name: Tb. Alta Ulil Abshor (Alta)
title: Infrastructure & Back-End Enthusiast
bio: Information Systems student at Telkom University and Enterprise Infrastructure Management Lab Staff. Focused on self-hosted infrastructure, back-end development, and open-source tooling, backed by hands-on experience running a personal Proxmox homelab.

terminalFS.about.md:
### About Me
I'm an Information Systems student at Telkom University, currently serving as Enterprise Infrastructure Management Lab Staff. My focus lies in self-hosted infrastructure, back-end development, and open-source tooling, backed by hands-on experience running a personal Proxmox homelab.

I actively work on projects involving Docker, Nginx, local LLM inference (llama.cpp + llama-swap), OpenWrt networking, and Laravel-based web applications.

Currently open to internship opportunities in Infrastructure, DevOps, or Back-End Development.
